title: Cybistetes herrei
intro: Unfortunately, I was unable to find information about the plant Cybistetes herrei.
taxonomy: Cybistetes herrei is a genus of extinct prawns in the family Astatidae. It is a fossil species found in South Africa. Cybistetes herrei is classified as a crustacean, specifically a decapod, and is believed to have lived during the Eocene epoch. The genus Cybistetes is also known to have been part of the ancient marine ecosystem. Cybistetes herrei's classification also places it within the subphylum Crustacea.
parts: Cybistetes herrei has been reported to have medicinal properties, but the specific parts of the plant that are used for medicinal purposes are not well-documented.
